## Release — Blackhole v0.5.1

### 🔧 What's new in v0.5.1

A build-tooling refactor: identity and tree-shape validation logic are now single-sourced,
closing the top DRY anti-pattern flagged in the architectural retrospective. Zero behavior
change — every compiled target is byte-for-byte identical to v0.5.0.

#### Identity SSOT

- **`scripts/project-identity.ts`** (new) — `name`, `version`, `description`, `homepage`,
  `repository`, and `keywords` are now derived from `package.json` in one place, replacing ~6
  hardcoded `'blackhole'` literals scattered across `scripts/build.ts`'s manifest builders. A
  future project rename now touches 1 file instead of ~6.

#### Tree-Shape SSOT

- **`scripts/tree-shape.ts`** (new) — the plugin tree-shape assertions duplicated between
  `scripts/build.ts` and `scripts/verify.ts` are now one dependency-free shared module, consumed
  by both.

#### Governance & cleanup

- **`documentation/decisions/INDEX.md`** (new) — indexes the 3 existing ADRs (fixes V-ADA-02)
- **`ARCHITECTURE.md`** (new) — comprehension-only architecture doc, paired with the
  retrospective that motivated this work (`documentation/architecture/retrospective-blackhole.md`)
- Orphaned `src/references/agent-tools.md` pruned; `coordinator.md`'s unconditional Cursor-only
  reference is now correctly gated behind `{{#cursor}}...{{/cursor}}`, fixing a dead link on 4 of
  5 compiled platforms

#### Build integrity fix

- **`cleanDir` no longer wipes `.claude/` wholesale** — it previously deleted the entire
  `.claude/` tree before rebuilding it, silently destroying tracked maintainer state
  (`.claude/initiatives/`, `.claude/progress.md`) that lives alongside the compiled output. Now
  cleans only the subdirs the build actually owns (`agents/`, `rules/`, `skills/`), matching the
  granularity already used for the root-level build targets. This was making `bun run verify`'s
  `V-BUILD-01` check spuriously fail in CI on every push once initiative state existed on a
  branch.
- Two `V-DRY-03` findings from review — a couple of manifest builders still hardcoding
  `description` and the repo URL instead of using the new `project-identity.ts` SSOT — fixed in
  the same pass.

### Verification

`bun test`: 183/183 pass (up from 141 at the retrospective's baseline). `bun run verify`: 18/18
checks pass, with no workaround needed.

---
